name: Blast
description: Tap matching objects in a configurable grid before time runs out.

config.label: Stage Width
config.description: Internal game-world width in pixels. The game logic and drawing use this coordinate system.

config.label: Stage Height
config.description: Internal game-world height in pixels.

config.label: Stage Portrait Ratio
config.description: Width divided by height. For `1080 / 1920`, this is a 9:16 portrait layout.

config.label: Stage Background Fill
config.description: Fallback canvas color shown behind the background image, useful when the viewport crops outside the stage.

config.label: Duration
config.description: Total game duration before the game ends.

config.label: Target Object Index
config.description: Zero-based index of the object shown in the HUD as the target. `0` uses `object-1.png`; values are clamped to available objects.

config.label: Target Count
config.description: Number of target objects the player needs to blast before the game ends.

config.label: Minimum Blast Group Size
config.description: Minimum connected same-object group size required for a tap to blast the group.

config.label: Grid Rows
config.description: Number of object rows in the board.

config.label: Grid Columns
config.description: Number of object columns in the board.

config.label: Grid Top Offset
config.description: Distance from the top of the stage to the top edge of the centered grid panel.

config.label: Grid Padding
config.description: Inner spacing between the panel edge and the first/last object centers.

config.label: Grid Horizontal Gap
config.description: Horizontal spacing between neighboring object cells.

config.label: Grid Vertical Gap
config.description: Vertical spacing between neighboring object cells.

config.label: Grid Panel Radius
config.description: Corner radius of the single rounded grid panel.

config.label: Grid Panel Fill Color
config.description: Fill color of the grid panel behind all objects.

config.label: Grid Panel Stroke Color
config.description: Stroke color around the grid panel.

config.label: Grid Panel Stroke Width
config.description: Stroke width around the grid panel.

config.label: Grid Panel Shadow Color
config.description: Drop shadow color for the grid panel.

config.label: Object Size
config.description: Render size of each object in game-world pixels.

config.label: Object Fall Speed
config.description: Falling speed for objects after a blast, in game-world pixels per second.

config.label: Target Spawn Chance
config.description: Probability that newly generated objects use the target object.

config.label: Minimum Target Cells
config.description: Minimum number of target objects kept on the board after generation or refill.

config.label: Blast Duration (ms)
config.description: How long blast particles and ring stay visible in milliseconds.

config.label: Blast Ring Start Radius
config.description: Starting radius of the blast ring.

config.label: Blast Ring End Radius
config.description: Final radius of the blast ring.

config.label: Blast Ring Width
config.description: Initial stroke width of the blast ring.

config.label: Blast Ring Color
config.description: Color of the blast ring.

config.label: Blast Particle Count
config.description: Number of small circle particles emitted per blasted object.

config.label: Blast Particle Distance
config.description: Maximum distance particles travel from the blasted object.

config.label: Blast Particle Size
config.description: Base radius of each particle.

config.label: Blast Particle Colors
config.description: Particle colors are cycled across the emitted circles.

config.label: Soundtrack Volume
config.description: Background music volume multiplier.

config.label: Effect Volume
config.description: Blast sound effect volume multiplier.

config.label: Low Time Warning Seconds
config.description: When remaining time is at or below this value, the timer HUD switches to warning color.

config.label: Instruction Text
config.description: Text shown between the top HUD and the grid.

config.label: HUD Top
config.description: Top offset from the safe-area top in CSS pixels.

config.label: HUD Width (vw)
config.description: HUD width as a percentage of viewport width.

config.label: HUD Max Width
config.description: Maximum HUD width in CSS pixels.

config.label: HUD Height
config.description: HUD panel height in CSS pixels.

config.label: HUD Gap
config.description: Gap between timer and target panels in CSS pixels.

config.label: HUD Font Size
config.description: HUD text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: HUD Text Color
config.description: Normal HUD text color.

config.label: HUD Warning Color
config.description: Timer warning color when time is low.

config.label: HUD Panel Color
config.description: Background color for timer and target panels.

config.label: HUD Panel Border Color
config.description: Border color for timer and target panels.

config.label: HUD Target Icon Size
config.description: Target icon size inside the HUD.

config.label: Instruction Top
config.description: Top offset for the instruction text in CSS pixels.

config.label: Instruction Font Size
config.description: Instruction text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: Instruction Color
config.description: Instruction text color.

config.label: Instruction Stroke Color
config.description: Shadow/stroke color used behind the instruction text.

config.label: End Button Text
config.description: Text shown on the end screen CTA button.

config.label: End Button Width
config.description: Button width in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Height
config.description: Button height in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Font Size
config.description: Button text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Center Y Percent
config.description: Button center Y position as a percentage of screen height.

config.label: End Button Color
config.description: Button background color.

config.label: End Button Text Color
config.description: Button text color.

config.label: End Button Pulse Scale
config.description: Largest scale used by the repeating big-small button effect.

config.label: End Button Pulse Duration (ms)
config.description: Duration of one big-small animation cycle in milliseconds.
